title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
